# WARP Client

Allows individuals or organizations to have a faster, more secure connection to the Internet

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).
>
> Use [WARP Client llms-full.txt](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/llms-full.txt) for the complete WARP Client documentation in a single file, intended for offline indexing, bulk vectorization, or large-context models.

## Overview

- [Cloudflare WARP client](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/index.md): Encrypt device traffic and connect to Cloudflare with the WARP client.

## WARP modes

- [WARP modes](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/warp-modes/index.md): Available WARP connection modes and their behavior.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/get-started/index.md): Install the Cloudflare WARP client on your devices.
- [Android](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/get-started/android/index.md): Install and configure WARP on Android devices.
- [iOS](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/get-started/ios/index.md): Install and configure WARP on iOS devices.
- [Linux](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/get-started/linux/index.md): Install and configure WARP on Linux.
- [macOS](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/get-started/macos/index.md): Install and configure WARP on macOS.
- [Windows](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/get-started/windows/index.md): Install and configure WARP on Windows.

## Privacy

- [Privacy](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/privacy/index.md): Privacy commitments for the Cloudflare WARP client.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/known-issues-and-faq/index.md): Known issues and answers to common WARP client questions.

## Legal

- [Legal](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/legal/index.md): Legal information for the Cloudflare WARP client.
- [Third party licenses](https://developers.cloudflare.com/warp-client/legal/3rdparty/index.md): Third-party licenses used in the WARP client.
